long_description:
Affected support: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Withdrawn (Night) - MAD02
Location: mad02
Ensuring Shift Coverage in MAD02 for the night shift from 23:00 to  07:30 (local time) due to MEF
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Withdrawn (Night) - MAD02
close_notes: Site Unattended - Manager on call for Sev1 issues
current_status_next_steps: Mad04 is watching the queues and will call the manager if any sev1 issue might arise. Manager is on call
